omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We and our service providers and third party partners may monitor some of your uses of, or activity on, our Digital Products – primarily in respect of any chatbots you interact with on our Digital Products or any calls you make to us and we may capture and retain records reflecting such activity on our Digital Products, for our business purposes. We may also use tracking technologies on our Digital Products (described further in our Cookies Policy at https://account.formula1.com/#/en/cookie-policy (https://account.formula1.com/#/en/cookie-policy)) to collect the foregoing information reflecting your use of and activity on our Digital Products, or may enable our third party partners to collect such information. This information may be collected, retained, captured, and/or monitored by us or by our service providers and third party partners. If you do not consent to the monitoring described here, you should not use our Digital Products.

If you do not consent to the monitoring described here, you should not use our Digital Products.
